user_variables.name: IP_DEF
user_variables.description: Returns the primary local IP address used for the default route.

user_variables.name: DNS_DEF
user_variables.description: Returns the first configured DNS nameserver from resolv.conf.

user_variables.name: MAC_DEF
user_variables.description: Returns the MAC address of the default network interface.

user_variables.name: GW_DEF
user_variables.description: Returns the default gateway IP address.

user_variables.name: IP_PUBLIC
user_variables.description: Returns the public (WAN) IP address using an external service.

user_variables.name: IP_ETH0
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show eth0 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for eth0 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_ETH1
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show eth1 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for eth1 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_ETH2
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show eth2 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for eth2 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_WLAN0
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show wlan0 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for wlan0 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_WLAN1
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show wlan1 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for wlan1 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_WLAN2
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show wlan2 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for wlan2 interface.

user_variables.name: IP_TUN0
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show tun0 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for tun0 (VPN) interface.

user_variables.name: IP_TUN1
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show tun1 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for tun1 (VPN) interface.

user_variables.name: IP_TUN2
user_variables.expression: ip -4 addr show tun2 | awk '/inet / {print $2}' | cut -d/ -f1
user_variables.description: Returns the IPv4 address for tun2 (VPN) interface.

user_variables.name: PORT_SOCKS5
user_variables.description: Returns the first SOCKS port defined in proxychains configuration.

user_variables.name: RAND_USER
user_variables.description: Generates a random username string with a hex suffix.

user_variables.name: RAND_PASS
user_variables.description: Generates a random 12-character password string.

user_variables.name: AD_DOMAIN
user_variables.description: Attempts to automatically detect the Active Directory domain using DNS SRV lookup.

user_variables.name: AD_DC_LIST
user_variables.description: Returns a space-separated list of detected Domain Controllers via DNS SRV query.

user_variables.name: AD_KDC
user_variables.description: Returns the detected Kerberos KDC server using DNS SRV lookup.

user_variables.name: LOG_USER
user_variables.description: Returns name of currently logged user
